case_title: ERIC A. NORCROSS et al VS. JOSEPH A. SEIDLER

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY CROSS COMPLAINANT SEIDLER, JOSEPH A. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT NORCROSS, JANE Y.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-19-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-19-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORCROSS, ERIC A. NORCROSS, JANE Y. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SEIDLER, JOSEPH A. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY CROSS COMPLAINANT SEIDLER, JOSEPH A. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT NORCROSS, ERIC A.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED DEC-08-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT NORCROSS, JANE Y.
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED AND FILED BY DEFENDANT SEIDLER, JOSEPH A.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT NORCROSS, ERIC A. NORCROSS, JANE Y.
DECLARATION OF ERIC A. NORCROSS FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORCROSS, ERIC A. NORCROSS, JANE Y.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-19-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-19-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-08-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT NORCROSS, ERIC A.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SEIDLER, JOSEPH A. RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT NORCROSS, ERIC A. NORCROSS, JANE Y. $1,081.45 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,151.45, DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TO DAMAGES OF $1,081.45 IN ADDITION TO THE AMOUNT OF $1,873.70 WHICH DEFENDANT PROPERLY DEDUCTED FROM PLAINTIFFS SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $4,875.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $4,081.45 FILED BY SEIDLER, JOSEPH A. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT NORCROSS, ERIC A. NORCROSS, JANE Y. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORCROSS, ERIC A. NORCROSS, JANE Y.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2013 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO FEB-19-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. DEFENDANT SENT A LETTER STATING THAT HE WAS UNABLE TO APPEAR IN COURT AT TODAYS HEARING AS HE WAS SICK AND ASKED FOR A CONTINUANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS)- GRANTED JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-19-2013 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,425.00 FILED BY NORCROSS, ERIC A. NORCROSS, JANE Y. AS TO DEFENDANT SEIDLER, JOSEPH A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$80.00) SERVED NOV-08-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SEIDLER, JOSEPH A.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2013 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO FEB-19-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY.
